integrations.name: LiteLLM
integrations.description: Add long-term memory to any LLM via LiteLLM proxy callbacks. Zero code changes — configure once and every model gets memory.

integrations.name: CrewAI
integrations.description: Give CrewAI agents persistent, cross-session memory. Facts learned in one run are available in every future run.

integrations.name: Pydantic AI
integrations.description: Integrate Hindsight memory into Pydantic AI agents with a simple dependency injection pattern.

integrations.name: Vercel AI SDK
integrations.description: Add persistent memory to Vercel AI SDK applications. Works with any model provider supported by the AI SDK.

integrations.name: Vercel Chat
integrations.description: Drop-in memory layer for the Vercel AI Chatbot. Remembers users across sessions out of the box.

integrations.name: Agno
integrations.description: Plug Hindsight into Agno agents for structured, long-term memory storage and retrieval.

integrations.name: Hermes
integrations.description: Use Hindsight as the memory backend for the Hermes multi-agent messaging framework.

integrations.name: MCP Server
integrations.description: Expose Hindsight memory as a Model Context Protocol server. Compatible with Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client.

integrations.name: OpenClaw
integrations.description: Integrate Hindsight with OpenClaw to add memory capabilities to Claude-based agent workflows.

integrations.name: Claude Code Skills
integrations.description: Add Hindsight memory to Claude Code agents via the Skills integration. Persistent context across coding sessions.

integrations.name: hindsight-openclaw-pro
integrations.description: Production-grade Hindsight memory plugin for OpenClaw — per-agent config, multi-bank recall, and IaC bank management via the hoppro CLI.
